title: Paper Baseball
description:
Paper Baseball is a 1v1 number deduction game based on the classic Bulls & Cows ruleset.

You and the AI take turns guessing each other's secret numbers using Strike/Ball feedback. Crack your opponent's number in fewer turns to win!

How to Play

• Strike – Right digit, right position

• Ball – Right digit, wrong position

• Out – Digit not in the number at all

Game Modes

• 3-Digit Mode – Quick, light matches

• 4-Digit Mode – The classic experience with deeper strategy

Difficulty

• Easy – Confirmed strike positions are revealed as a hint

• Normal – Standard rules, fair and balanced

• Hard – The AI plays optimally using a minimax algorithm; duplicate digits allowed

Stats & Achievements Track your win rate, best clear turns, and total playtime. Unlock achievements to prove your mastery.
description_short: Guess the secret number. Beat the AI. A classic Bulls & Cows deduction game with 3 or 4-digit modes, three difficulty levels, and a sharp AI opponent. Simple rules, deep strategy
